_comment: Seed catalog for the AgentNet skill marketplace (devnet). Curated from popular, generic, reusable agent skills across skills.sh, awesome-claude/openclaw-skills, anthropics/skills, and real dev-loop workflow research. 50 skills + 5 workflows. Every workflow's requiredSkills name MUST exist in `skills` below (the seed script resolves names -> minted mint ids and verifies all are present before publishing any workflow).

skills.name: format-and-lint
skills.description: Auto-format the working diff and fix lint violations so the change matches the repository's style and rules.

skills.name: run-test-suite
skills.description: Run the project's test suite and report pass/fail, surfacing each failing test with its assertion and location.

skills.name: write-conventional-commit
skills.description: Generate a Conventional Commits message (type, scope, summary, body) from the staged diff.

skills.name: open-pull-request
skills.description: Push the current branch and open a pull request with a generated title, summary, and test results.

skills.name: triage-issue
skills.description: Read a tracker issue and its logs, locate the relevant code, and produce a root-cause plan for the fix.

skills.name: write-regression-test
skills.description: Write a failing test that reproduces a reported bug, so the fix can be verified and locked in.

skills.name: apply-code-fix
skills.description: Implement the minimal change that makes a failing test pass without breaking the rest of the suite.

skills.name: upgrade-dependency
skills.description: Bump a package to a target or latest version, update the lockfile, and rebuild the project.

skills.name: collect-commits-since-tag
skills.description: Gather the merged commits and pull requests since the last release tag for changelog generation.

skills.name: generate-changelog
skills.description: Group commits by type and rewrite them into human-readable, categorized release notes.

skills.name: bump-version
skills.description: Infer the correct semver level from the changes and update version manifests accordingly.

skills.name: tag-and-release
skills.description: Commit the version bump, create the git tag, and publish the release with the generated notes.

skills.name: write-characterization-tests
skills.description: Generate tests that pin a module's current behavior, bugs and all, as a safety net before refactoring.

skills.name: refactor-module
skills.description: Restructure code for readability and maintainability without changing its observable behavior.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Review a diff or file for correctness, performance, and maintainability, and report concrete suggestions.

skills.name: explain-code
skills.description: Walk through what a piece of code does, step by step, for onboarding or comprehension.

skills.name: explain-regex
skills.description: Decode a regular expression into plain-language meaning, token by token.

skills.name: optimize-performance
skills.description: Profile bottlenecks and apply algorithmic or resource improvements to slow paths and hot loops.

skills.name: code-smell-detector
skills.description: Flag anti-patterns, duplication, and overly complex functions that need attention.

skills.name: convert-language
skills.description: Translate code from one programming language to another with idiomatic output.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Apply a structured four-phase methodology to isolate and fix a bug or unexpected behavior.

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: Validate fixes and run all relevant checks before marking a task as done.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Drive the red-green-refactor loop: write a failing test first, then the minimal code to pass it.

skills.name: generate-unit-tests
skills.description: Produce unit tests with edge cases for a given function or module.

skills.name: generate-test-data
skills.description: Create realistic fixtures and mocks for tests.

skills.name: integration-test-writer
skills.description: Author end-to-end and integration tests that exercise multiple components together.

skills.name: coverage-gap-finder
skills.description: Identify untested branches and suggest the tests needed to close the gaps.

skills.name: webapp-testing-playwright
skills.description: Automate browser and UI testing with Playwright, including screenshot verification.

skills.name: security-audit
skills.description: Scan code for vulnerabilities and unsafe patterns and report findings with severity.

skills.name: owasp-top-10-review
skills.description: Review code against the OWASP Top 10 and ASVS standards using a structured checklist.

skills.name: secret-scanner
skills.description: Find hardcoded credentials, API keys, and tokens across a codebase.

skills.name: dependency-vuln-check
skills.description: Flag known-vulnerable dependencies with CVE detail and suggest safe upgrades.

skills.name: prompt-injection-screen
skills.description: Detect prompt-injection and data-exfiltration risks in agent inputs and tool calls.

skills.name: input-sanitizer
skills.description: Add validation and escaping to untrusted-input handling to prevent injection flaws.

skills.name: resolve-merge-conflict
skills.description: Reconcile conflicting hunks during a merge while preserving the intent of both sides.

skills.name: git-workflow-helper
skills.description: Advise on branching, rebasing, and repository management best practices.

skills.name: pr-description-writer
skills.description: Summarize a diff into a clear, reviewer-friendly pull-request description.

skills.name: write-docstrings
skills.description: Generate function and class docstrings directly from the code.

skills.name: generate-readme
skills.description: Produce a project README from the codebase, covering setup, usage, and structure.

skills.name: api-doc-generator
skills.description: Document endpoints, parameters, and responses for an API with OpenAPI output.

skills.name: technical-writer
skills.description: Turn features into clear step-by-step user guides and reference docs.

skills.name: diagram-generator
skills.description: Emit Mermaid or Graphviz diagrams of code, data, or system relationships.

skills.name: write-sql-query
skills.description: Generate SQL for a described data question against a given schema.

skills.name: optimize-sql
skills.description: Explain a query's execution plan and rewrite it for speed with proper indexing.

skills.name: csv-json-pipeline
skills.description: Parse, clean, transform, and summarize CSV and JSON datasets.

skills.name: data-visualization
skills.description: Create charts, graphs, and interactive visualizations from a dataset.

skills.name: write-dockerfile
skills.description: Produce a production-grade Dockerfile for a given stack.

skills.name: ci-cd-pipeline
skills.description: Generate GitHub Actions or CI workflow files for build, test, and deploy.

skills.name: infra-as-code-helper
skills.description: Author and review Terraform or Kubernetes manifests for infrastructure-as-code.

skills.name: generate-react-component
skills.description: Scaffold a React component with modern tooling and styling (Tailwind/shadcn).

skills.name: accessibility-audit
skills.description: Check a UI against WCAG guidelines and suggest concrete accessibility fixes.

skills.name: design-rest-api
skills.description: Define endpoints, schemas, and status codes for a resource following REST conventions.

skills.name: add-auth-flow
skills.description: Implement JWT or session authentication in an application.

skills.name: database-migration
skills.description: Author safe schema-versioning and migration patterns for a database.

skills.name: prompt-enhancer
skills.description: Rewrite a basic prompt into a detailed, well-structured one with clear constraints.

skills.name: build-mcp-server
skills.description: Scaffold a high-quality Model Context Protocol server exposing tools to an agent.

skills.name: research-assistant
skills.description: Run multi-step web research, gather sources, and synthesize a cited answer.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Meta-skill that scaffolds and validates new SKILL.md skills from a description.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Break work into small, verifiable, file-specific implementation tasks before coding.

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Use Socratic refinement to turn a rough idea into a validated, concrete design.

skills.name: multi-agent-orchestrator
skills.description: Coordinate sub-agents to decompose and complete a larger task in parallel.

skills.name: pdf-docx-xlsx-pptx
skills.description: Generate and edit PDF, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents.

workflows.name: open-a-clean-pr
workflows.description: Turn uncommitted local changes into a review-ready pull request: formatted, tested, and conventionally committed.
recipe: Run format-and-lint on the working tree; stage the resulting changes.
Run run-test-suite; if any test fails, stop and report the failures (do not open a PR).
On green, call write-conventional-commit to author the commit from the staged diff.
Commit, then open-pull-request to push the branch and open a PR with a summary plus test results.

workflows.name: fix-the-issue
workflows.description: Take a tracker issue, reproduce it, write the fix plus a regression test, and open the PR that closes it.
recipe: triage-issue: read the issue and linked logs, search the codebase, write a root-cause plan.
write-regression-test: add a test that fails on the current code, reproducing the bug.
apply-code-fix: make the smallest change that turns the failing test green; rerun to confirm no regressions.
open-pull-request: open a PR linking 'Closes #<issue>' with the root-cause summary and the new test.

workflows.name: safe-dependency-bump
workflows.description: Upgrade a dependency, run the suite, auto-repair any breakage, and open a PR, or back out cleanly if it can't be fixed.
recipe: upgrade-dependency: bump the package, update the lockfile, rebuild.
run-test-suite: run the full suite; if green, skip to the PR step.
apply-code-fix: read failures, patch broken call sites, rerun, loop up to N times; if still red, revert the bump and report.
open-pull-request: open a PR with the version delta, what broke, and how it was fixed.

workflows.name: cut-a-release
workflows.description: Roll all merged work since the last tag into a categorized changelog, bump the version, and publish the release.
recipe: collect-commits-since-tag: list merged commits and PRs since the latest tag.
generate-changelog: categorize into Features / Fixes / Breaking and rewrite into prose notes.
bump-version: infer the semver level from the changes and update the manifests.
tag-and-release: commit the bump, create the tag, and publish the release with the generated notes.

workflows.name: harden-legacy-module
workflows.description: Wrap an untested legacy module in a characterization-test safety net, then refactor it without changing behavior.
recipe: write-characterization-tests: generate tests capturing the module's existing outputs; confirm they pass as-is.
refactor-module: improve structure and readability with no intended behavior change.
run-test-suite: rerun the characterization tests; any diff means behavior changed, so revert and retry.
open-pull-request: open a PR pairing the new safety-net tests with the refactor, noting 'no behavior change, tests green'.
